title: Potential bug in evaluating combinatorial wrapping to 0

features.name: combinatorial addition overflow comparison
features.description: Code should include an addition operation on a signal at its maximum bit-width value, followed by an equality comparison against another signal in a combinatorial block

features.name: modulo wraparound on overflowed addition
features.description: Code should include a modulo operation applied to an addition result to force wraparound behavior when the addend reaches maximum bit width
